<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request. A few things to check before submitting:

- Tests for the new behaviour are included (`make test` is green locally)
- Linter is happy (`make lint` is green locally)
- For a user-visible change, CHANGELOG.md has an entry
- For a new flag / format / detector, README.md is updated
- Commit messages explain the WHY, not just the WHAT
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. Link any related issue. -->

Closes #

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. What is this enabling, or what bug is this fixing? -->

## How was it tested?

<!--
- New unit tests added in ...
- Manually verified by running `licscan scan ...` against ...
- CI matrix runs cover ...
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] README.md updated (for new flags / formats / detectors)
